item.title: LEGO 41695 Friends Pet Clinic
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 41695 Friends Pet Clinic at the following link: ℹ️: Number of pieces: 111 Upstairs is a grooming area for pet play and pampering, complete with a bath and cat gym, plus a cat scratcher Downstairs features the cash register, a toy scanner to check the patients, and an instrument cabinet packed with children’s vet kit Manufacturer recommended age: 4+ Pet Clinic 🛒 Check the deal!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
